FR-01.title: User Registration and Authentication
requirements: Users can register with email or social media accounts
Password must be securely hashed
System sends verification email after registration
Social login via Google and Facebook
acceptance_criteria: User can register and log in with correct credentials
Social login creates account and logs in

FR-02.title: User Profile Creation
requirements: Users can create profile with name, bio, and profile picture
Profile picture supports JPEG and PNG up to 5MB
Username must be unique and 3-20 characters
Bio is optional with max 160 characters
acceptance_criteria: Profile is created with all provided fields
Profile is visible to other users

FR-03.title: Post Creation and Sharing
requirements: Users can create posts with text, images, and videos
Posts can be public or private
Users can tag other users in posts
Posts support hashtags for discoverability
acceptance_criteria: Post is created and visible on feed
Private posts only visible to creator
Hashtags are clickable and show related posts

FR-04.title: News Feed
requirements: Display posts from followed users in chronological order
Infinite scroll loading for feed
Pull-to-refresh for latest posts
Show post author, content, like count, and comment count
acceptance_criteria: Feed loads posts from followed users only

FR-05.title: Like and Comment System
requirements: Users can like and unlike posts
Users can comment on posts
Comments support text and emoji
Post owner receives notification on like and comment
acceptance_criteria: Notification is sent to post owner
User can delete their own comments

FR-06.title: Follow and Unfollow
requirements: Users can follow other users
Users can unfollow users they follow
Follower and following counts displayed on profile
Private accounts require follow approval
acceptance_criteria: Approved follows grant access to private posts

FR-07.title: Direct Messaging
requirements: Users can send private text messages
Messages delivered in real-time
Users can block and report abusive messages
Read receipts show delivery status
acceptance_criteria: Read receipts show sent, delivered, read
Reported messages flagged for admin review

FR-08.title: Story Feature
requirements: Users can post stories that disappear after 24 hours
Stories support images and short videos
Stories show viewer list to the author
Stories appear at top of the feed
acceptance_criteria: Story is visible for exactly 24 hours
Story supports image and video upload
Author can see who viewed their story

FR-09.title: User Search and Discovery
requirements: Search bar to find users by name or username
Explore page showing trending posts
Suggested users based on mutual connections
Search results show user avatar, name, and follower count

FR-10.title: Push Notifications
requirements: Notifications for likes, comments, follows, and messages
Users can customize notification preferences
Notification center shows all recent activity
Badge count on app icon

FR-11.title: Content Moderation
requirements: Users can report inappropriate content
Admin dashboard for reviewing reports
Automatic content filtering for profanity
Admin can remove posts and ban users
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view and action reports
Banned users cannot access the platform

FR-12.title: Privacy Settings
requirements: Users can set account to private
Users can control who can message them
Users can hide online status
Users can download their data
acceptance_criteria: Private account hides posts from non-followers
Online status is hidden when disabled
Data download includes all user content

FR-01.title: Build Authentication API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (email, password, name), POST /api/auth/login (email, password), POST /api/auth/social (provider, token). Hash passwords with bcrypt. Generate JWT tokens. Send verification email on register.

FR-01.title: Build Auth Screens
FR-01.description: Create login screen with email/password inputs and social login buttons (Google, Facebook). Create registration screen with name, email, password fields. Add password strength indicator and validation.

FR-01.title: Implement Social OAuth Integration
FR-01.description: Integrate Google Sign-In and Facebook Login SDKs. Handle OAuth flow, token exchange, and account creation. Link social accounts to existing email accounts if matching.

FR-01.title: Write Auth Tests
FR-01.description: Test registration with valid data. Test duplicate email rejection. Test login with correct and incorrect credentials. Test social login creates account. Test verification email is sent.

FR-02.title: Build Profile API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/profiles (create profile), GET /api/profiles/:username (get profile), PATCH /api/profiles (update). Validate username uniqueness. Handle avatar upload to cloud storage.

FR-02.title: Build Profile Setup Screen
FR-02.description: Create profile setup flow with avatar upload circle, name input, username input with availability check, and bio textarea with 160 char counter. Show preview before saving.

FR-02.title: Implement Image Upload Service
FR-02.description: Create image service: validate type (JPEG/PNG), check size (max 5MB), compress, generate thumbnail, upload to Firebase Storage. Return public URL.

FR-03.title: Build Post Creation API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/posts. Accept text (max 2000 chars), media files, visibility (public/private), tagged_users, hashtags. Store media in cloud storage. Auto-extract hashtags from text.

FR-03.title: Build Post Composer UI
FR-03.description: Create post creation screen with text area, media picker, visibility toggle, user tag autocomplete, and hashtag suggestions. Media preview thumbnails. Character counter. Post button.

FR-03.title: Implement Hashtag System
FR-03.description: Parse hashtags from text. Store in hashtags collection with post references. Create GET /api/hashtags/:tag for posts by hashtag. Track usage count for trending.

FR-04.title: Build News Feed API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/feed with cursor-based pagination. Return posts from followed users ordered by created_at desc. Include author info, like/comment counts, and current user's like status.

FR-04.title: Build Feed Screen
FR-04.description: Create feed screen with FlatList/RecyclerView for posts. Each post card shows author avatar, name, content, media, like/comment buttons, and timestamp. Implement infinite scroll and pull-to-refresh.

FR-04.title: Implement Feed Caching
FR-04.description: Cache feed data locally for offline viewing. Implement optimistic updates for likes. Sync with server on connectivity restore. Show cached data while loading fresh content.

FR-05.title: Build Like API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/posts/:id/like (toggle like). Update like count atomically. Create notification for post owner. Return updated like status and count.

FR-05.title: Build Comment API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/posts/:id/comments (add comment), GET /api/posts/:id/comments (list with pagination), DELETE /api/comments/:id (delete own). Create notification for post owner.

FR-05.title: Build Like and Comment UI
FR-05.description: Add like button with animation (heart fill). Show like count. Comment section with input field, send button, and comment list. Show commenter avatar, name, text, and timestamp.

FR-06.title: Build Follow API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/users/:id/follow, DELETE /api/users/:id/follow. Handle private account follow requests. Update follower/following counts atomically. Send notification on follow.

FR-06.title: Build Follow UI
FR-06.description: Add Follow/Unfollow button on user profiles. Show follower and following counts. Show Requested state for private accounts. Followers and following list screens.

FR-06.title: Implement Follow Request System
FR-06.description: Create follow_requests collection for private accounts. Endpoints: GET /api/follow-requests, POST /api/follow-requests/:id/accept, POST /api/follow-requests/:id/reject.

FR-07.title: Build Messaging Backend
FR-07.description: Set up Firebase Realtime Database for messages. Structure: conversations/:id/messages/:id. Create message with sender_id, content, status (sent/delivered/read), timestamp. Send push notification.

FR-07.title: Build Chat Screen
FR-07.description: Create chat UI with message bubbles, text input, send button. Status indicators (ticks). Auto-scroll to latest. Show timestamps. Implement typing indicator.

FR-07.title: Implement Block and Report
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/users/:id/block, POST /api/messages/:id/report. Blocked users cannot send messages (403). Reports stored for admin review.

FR-08.title: Build Story API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/stories (upload image/video, auto-expire after 24h), GET /api/stories/feed (stories from followed users), GET /api/stories/:id/viewers (viewer list). Scheduled cleanup for expired stories.

FR-08.title: Build Story UI
FR-08.description: Create story viewer with full-screen display, progress bar, tap to next/previous. Story creation with camera/gallery, text overlay. Story ring on profile avatars.

FR-08.title: Implement Story Expiry
FR-08.description: Set TTL on story documents (24 hours). Run scheduled cleanup job. Track viewers in story_views collection. Remove expired stories from feed.

FR-09.title: Build Search API
FR-09.description: Create GET /api/search/users?q= for user search. GET /api/explore for trending posts (sorted by engagement). GET /api/users/suggested for mutual connection recommendations.

FR-09.title: Build Search and Explore Screens
FR-09.description: Create search screen with search bar and results list (avatar, name, username, follower count). Explore tab with trending post grid. Suggested users carousel.

FR-10.title: Implement Push Notification Service
FR-10.description: Set up Firebase Cloud Messaging. Send notifications for likes, comments, follows, messages. Create notification records in database. Respect user notification preferences.

FR-10.title: Build Notification Center
FR-10.description: Create notification screen listing all activity: likes, comments, follows, messages. Group by type. Show unread badge. Mark as read on view. Navigate to relevant content on tap.

FR-10.title: Build Notification Settings
FR-10.description: Create notification preferences screen with toggles for each type (likes, comments, follows, messages). Store preferences in user profile. API endpoint to update preferences.

FR-11.title: Build Content Report API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/reports with content_type (post/comment/user), content_id, and reason. Store in reports collection. Notify admin. Create GET /api/admin/reports for admin dashboard.

FR-11.title: Build Admin Moderation Dashboard
FR-11.description: Create admin panel showing pending reports with content preview, reporter info, and action buttons (Remove Content, Ban User, Dismiss). Filter by report type and status.

FR-11.title: Implement Profanity Filter
FR-11.description: Create content filtering middleware that checks post text and comments against profanity word list. Block or flag content with violations. Allow admin to manage word list.

FR-12.title: Build Privacy Settings API
FR-12.description: Create PATCH /api/settings/privacy. Support fields: is_private (boolean), allow_messages (everyone/followers/nobody), show_online_status (boolean). Apply settings across all relevant endpoints.

FR-12.title: Build Privacy Settings Screen
FR-12.description: Create settings screen with toggles: Private Account, Online Status. Dropdowns: Who Can Message Me. Data Download button. Clear descriptions for each setting.

FR-12.title: Implement Data Export
FR-12.description: Create POST /api/settings/export-data. Generate ZIP archive with user profile, posts, comments, messages, and media. Send download link via email. GDPR compliant.
